name: Fudge Drops
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Christmas with Southern Living, 1993
Place milk chocolate morsels in a microwave-safe bowl. Microwave at Medium (50% power) for 2 minutes. Stir in the cereal and peanuts. Drop spoonfuls onto wax paper-lined cookie sheets. Garnish as desired. Chill until firm. Yield: 4 dozen.
